screens.title: Trip
screens._note: screen_trip is a locally-integrated odometer: DISTANCE, underway time, avg/max SOG, live SOG. Only live SOG is a SignalK path (navigation.speedOverGround). DISTANCE and underway time are device-local (kind:local) - the firmware persists them in NVS and has no SignalK path. The config schema permits source kind:local, but the square-480 capability manifest advertises sources:[signalk] only, so these two tiles fail the capability (caps) layer by design - see validation report. Modeled hero-split: hero=DISTANCE, column=[underway time, live SOG]; avg/max SOG dropped.
